properties.displayName: Nessus - Scan Launched Outside Business Hours
properties.description: Detects when a Nessus scan is started outside business hours (before 07:00 or after 19:00 UTC). Scans launched at unusual times may indicate unauthorized use of the scanner.
properties.query:
NessusLogs
| where LogType == "BackendLog" and isnotempty(BackendScanName)
| extend HourOfDay = datetime_part("Hour", TimeGenerated)
| where HourOfDay < 7 or HourOfDay >= 19
| project TimeGenerated, BackendUsername, BackendScanName, BackendScanID, HourOfDay
| extend AccountCustomEntity = BackendUsername
